flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Washington State Community College rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.1k → $3.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Washington State Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Washington State Community College rose 71% between 2006 and 2009 (28.1% → 48.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Washington State Community College rose 55% between 2021 and 2024 (957 → 1.5k).
